case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORP. VS. CONSUMER CHOICE SERVICES INC. et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON APR-23-2002 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR BEFORE HEARING BY COURT.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $111.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CONSUMER CHOICE SERVICES INC. BEARD, JUSTIN

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT CONSUMER CHOICE SERVICES INC. BEARD, JUSTIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-24-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-26-2002

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORP. HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONSUMER CHOICE SERVICES INC. BEARD, JUSTIN POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: TEN DIGITAL IMAGING SYSTEMS, SERIAL NUMBERS LP 009068,69,70,71,72,73,74,75,76,77, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $5,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $17,564.03 DAMAGES, $2,100.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,775.03, INTEREST $5000.00. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
